label: The Refracted Ossuary
description: The Refracted Ossuary forms a deep interior void where the Caustic Spire’s lattice-cut planes converge into a polygonal cavern of glass and dark crystalline seam. Its walls carry frozen caustic patterns as permanent bands of light and absolute shadow, aligned to Vesper Node’s meridian radiance with geometric precision. Rectilinear fissures open into narrow side pockets that preserve thin laminar sheets of air, producing a strict stratification of temperature and sound. The floor presents a tessellated field of splintered prisms that refract every glint into hard angles, denying any soft edge within the chamber.
